name: Reese's Peanut Butter Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. In a saucepan, melt the butter. Add the peanut butter and stir until melted. Mix in the sugar and vanilla extract. Beat in the eggs.
4. Combine the flour, baking powder, and salt. Stir well into the batter.
5. Remove about 1 3/4 cups of the batter and stir in the cocoa. Spread this chocolate batter into the prepared pan.
6. Pour the remaining batter over the top.
7. Bake for 30 minutes or until the brownies just begin to pull away from the sides of the pan. Allow to cool completely in the pan on a wire rack before cutting into bars (approximately 36 pieces).
